summary:
Claim: The mandibular first premolar commonly exhibits a C-shaped canal.  
Evidence: - It typically has two canals (main and accessory) forming a "C" shape due to incomplete fusion during development. - This configuration occurs more frequently than in other premolars.  
Answer: A

Answer: A. Answer choice: A
